records.question: Which drivers are assigned to school buses that are exactly full-time?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
WHERE school_bus.if_full_time = 'T'
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id, driver.name from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id where school_bus.if_full_time = 'Yes' limit 5
records.thought: Need to find drivers who work full-time on school buses. This requires joining driver with school_bus table and filtering where If_full_time indicates full-time status (likely 'Yes' or similar value).

records.question: Which drivers named Douglas McCrory, who are at least 36 years old, live in Hartford, belong to the Dem party, and drive full-time school buses with exactly 8 years of experience?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
WHERE school_bus.years_working = 8 AND driver.age >= 36 AND driver.name = 'Douglas McCrory' AND school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND driver.home_city = 'Hartford' AND driver.party = 'Dem'
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id where lower(driver.name) like '%douglas mccrory%' and driver.age >= 36 and lower(driver.home_city) like '%hartford%' and lower(driver.party) like '%dem%' and school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' and school_bus.years_working = 8 limit 5
records.thought: Need to filter drivers by exact name, age, city, party, and join with school_bus to check full-time status and years of experience. All conditions must match exactly.

records.question: Which drivers who live in East Hartford, are Democrats, and drive full-time school buses work with schools?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
JOIN school ON school_bus.school_id = school.school_id
WHERE driver.home_city = 'East Hartford' AND school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND driver.party = 'Dem'
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id, driver.name, driver.home_city, driver.party from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id where lower(driver.home_city) like '%east hartford%' and lower(driver.party) like '%democrat%' and school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' limit 5
records.thought: Need to find drivers from East Hartford who are Democrats and work full-time. This requires joining driver with school_bus to check the full-time status (If_full_time field).

records.question: Which drivers associated with school buses work where the party is Dem?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
JOIN school ON school_bus.school_id = school.school_id
WHERE driver.party = 'Dem'
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id, driver.name, driver.party from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id where lower(driver.party) = 'dem' limit 5
records.thought: Need to find drivers who work on school buses and belong to the 'Dem' party. This requires joining school_bus with driver table and filtering by party = 'Dem'.

records.question: Which drivers named Matthew Ritter are at least 40 years old, belong to the Dem party, and have Hartford as their home city?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
WHERE driver.name = 'Matthew Ritter' AND driver.party = 'Dem' AND driver.age >= 40 AND driver.home_city = 'Hartford'
records.pred_sql: select driver_id from driver where lower(name) like '%matthew ritter%' and age >= 40 and lower(party) = 'dem' and lower(home_city) like '%hartford%' limit 5
records.thought: This query filters the driver table for specific criteria: name matching 'Matthew Ritter', age >= 40, party = 'Dem', and home_city = 'Hartford'. No joins needed since all conditions are on the driver table itself.

records.question: Which drivers named Matthew Ritter are from Hartford and belong to the Dem party?

records.question: Which drivers named Minnie Gonzalez, aged at least 46 and living in Hartford, work full-time driving school buses for no more than 3 years at private schools with grades 5th-12th grade?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
JOIN school ON school_bus.school_id = school.school_id
WHERE driver.name = 'Minnie Gonzalez' AND driver.age >= 46 AND driver.home_city = 'Hartford' AND school_bus.years_working <= 3 AND school.grade = '5th-12th grade' AND school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND school.type = 'Private'
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id join school on school_bus.school_id = school.school_id where lower(driver.name) like '%minnie gonzalez%' and driver.age >= 46 and lower(driver.home_city) like '%hartford%' and school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' and school_bus.years_working <= 3 and lower(school.type) like '%private%' and lower(school.grade) like '%5th-12th%' limit 5
records.thought: Need to join driver with school_bus and school tables to filter by driver name, age, city, full-time status, years working, and school type/grade. All conditions must be met simultaneously.

records.question: Which drivers are Democrats living in Hartford?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
WHERE driver.party = 'Dem' AND driver.home_city = 'Hartford'
records.pred_sql: select driver_id, name, party, home_city from driver where lower(party) like '%democrat%' and lower(home_city) like '%hartford%' limit 5
records.thought: Need to filter drivers by Party='Democrat' and Home_city='Hartford'. Since all required fields are in the driver table, no joins are needed.

records.question: Which drivers are members of the Rep party and have Coventry as their home city?

records.pred_sql: select driver_id, name, party, home_city, age from driver where lower(party) like '%rep%' and lower(home_city) like '%coventry%' limit 5
records.thought: This query requires filtering the driver table by two conditions: Party must be 'Rep' and Home_city must be 'Coventry'. No joins are needed since all required information is in the driver table.

records.question: Which drivers aged at least 46 have been working exactly 3 years as full-time school bus drivers?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
WHERE school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND school_bus.years_working = 3 AND driver.age >= 46
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id, driver.name, driver.age from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id where driver.age >= 46 and school_bus.years_working = 3 and school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' limit 5
records.thought: Need to join driver with school_bus to filter by age (>=46), years working (=3), and full-time status. The school_bus table contains the working years and full-time information, so a join on Driver_ID is required.
